title: Anand Mahindra gushes about underrated state with ancient forests, iconic sunrise spots and waterfalls: ‘It gets overlooked....’
description: Industrialist Anand Mahindra recently highlighted Jharkhand as an overlooked holiday destination, inspired by stunning images of Meghahatuburu. He noted the state's diverse attractions, from Netarhat's sunrises to Betla National Park, despite its basic tourism infrastructure, suggesting its understated charm offers unique travel potential.

title: CULTURE | When the flames dim – Faith challenges Beqa’s ancient firewalking ritual
description: THE decision by mataqali matarua to discontinue firewalking in Naceva Village on Beqa Island has led to the complete halt of a centuries-old tradition once central to community life within the clan. Mataqali matarua of yavusa kulu was among the first in the village to formally abandon the ritual known as vilavilairevo, a move that [...] The post CULTURE | When the flames dim – Faith challenges Beqa’s ancient firewalking ritual appeared first on The Fiji Times .

title: Faith in an Ancient Rhythm
description: Daniel Balkaran has found a new way to express his faith.The singer, songwriter, music producer and educator has drawn attention with his “Chutney Gospel Praise Medley”, a work that brings Christian worship into the East Indian chutney sounds he grew...

title: Heritage trust receives national award after Roman archaeology projects re-write history books
description: A decade of archaeological work, which has helped to re-write the history books in Suffolk, has been recognised with a prestigious national accolade.

title: Our modern vision evolved from ancient one-eyed worm creature, finds study
description: Evolution of paired eyes in vertebrates was key to brain growth, enabling complex behaviour and cognition, highlighting the deep link between vision and the development of larger, more advanced brains
